site.title: Kĩkundi kya International Accessibility Task Force
site.tagline: Kwĩthĩwa na Ndĩni Ĩvangĩtwe Nesa na Kũsianĩsya Kĩla Ũĩkĩĩaa na Kĩla Mbivilia Ĩmanyĩasya
nav.label: Kĩlungu kya mbee
hero.home.eyebrow: Open Source Access Ũtonyi wa Kũsianĩsya Kĩla Ũĩkĩĩaa na Kĩla Mbivilia Ĩmanyĩasya
meta.home.description: IATF nĩalyũlaa kĩla kĩkendeka ngoonĩ kĩthĩwe kĩndũ kya kũtũmĩwa nĩ andũ onthe.
meta.projects.description: Sisya maũvoo ala methĩawa maeleetye ũndũ mĩvango ya IATF ĩendeee.
meta.propose.description: Kũlya ũtetheew'e kwĩsĩla Indaneti, simũ, kana kombiũta.
meta.governance.description: Ĩmanyĩsye ũndũ IATF yĩkaa mĩvango ya kũthokya andũ, kũũngamĩa movisi ma ũvonge, na kũandĩka mavalũa ma kũthokany'a.
meta.join.description: Nzĩa ila ũtonya kũtũmĩa nĩ kana ũtetheesye wĩa wa IATF: kũandĩka maelesyo ma w'o, kũalyũla, kũtata, kana kũseũvya syĩndũ ila itũmĩawa wĩanĩ ũsu.
meta.accessibility.description: Ũndũ IATF ĩthũkũmĩaa nĩ kana andũ matonye kũlika Kĩsesenĩ kya www.jw.org/kam, na ũndũ mũndũ ũtonya kwĩyĩandĩkĩthya atũmĩĩte kaati sya vulongulamu.
meta.transparency.description: IATF ĩkaa ũkunĩkĩli ĩteũvithany'a asomi ĩũlũ wa ũndũ ũsu, na ĩkaumasya maelesyo ma vata ĩũlũ wa kĩla kĩũneenewa.
actions.proposeProject: Kwambĩĩa mũvango wa kwĩka maũndũ mana ũthũkũminĩ wa Yeova
actions.readGovernance: Ĩsomo yĩla yĩatĩĩe nĩyĩũtwony'a ũndũ tũtonya kwĩka ũu.
actions.visitGithub: Mantha Kĩsese Kĩna kya Indaneti kya GitHub
actions.emailProjects: Tũmĩa kaati sya kumya ũkũsĩ nĩ kana umye maelesyo
registry.empty.title: O na yu vai mavuku maeleetw'e ũndũ mũna ĩũlũ wa Mbivilia.
registry.empty.body: IATF nĩendeee kũseũvya ĩvuku yayo ya mbee ya kũmanyĩsya andũ Mbivilia.
registry.col.repository: Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova
registry.repositoryLabel: Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova
proposal.form.title: Kũlya Ũtetheew'e
proposal.form.body: Andĩka valũa ũeleetye kana no ũtũngĩwe mĩvothi ĩsu wamyenda.
proposal.form.noscript: Nĩ kana ũlike Kĩsesenĩ kitũ ũandĩkaa valũa ũtũmĩĩte JavaScript. Ethĩwa ndwĩ vo, no ũtũmĩe mesengyi sya simũ kana ũtũmĩe isese sya kũea ngewa Indanetinĩ.
proposal.form.runtimeUnavailable: Email ĩno yĩthĩawa ĩandĩkĩwe mũndũ enda kũtũma mesengyi mbuku, na kwoou mũndũ ũsu ayenda kũtũmĩa e-mail ĩsu no atũmĩe ũvano ũũ wa QR.
proposal.form.loadingProtection: Nĩendeee kwĩyũmbany'a ũndũ ndonya kwĩlikya kaũnĩ ũsu.
proposal.form.ready: Ĩla wesa kũtũma mĩvothi ĩsu, lilikana kana ala makuĩtwe maileaa kũmanya kĩla kĩendeee.
proposal.form.turnstileRequired: Wĩkũlw'a ũtanamba kũtũma mesengyi, sisya vala vaandĩkĩtwe "Spam".
proposal.form.turnstileExpired: Ekana na ũvoo ũsu kwa kũtũmĩa kombiũta, na ũiũsomaa ĩvinda yĩngĩ ũtanatũmĩa mesengyi.
proposal.form.turnstileError: Kũsũvĩa kũla ndũnĩtũmĩwe mesengyi ndatonya kũĩkĩĩthw'a ĩvindanĩ yĩĩ.
proposal.form.turnstileTimeout: Kĩsese kitũ kya jw.org kĩ na syĩndũ mbingĩ itonya ũkũtetheesya ĩla ũkwenda kũvingũa kaati sya kumya ũkũsĩ.
proposal.form.requiredMessage: Wĩkũlw'a ũandĩke maũndũ ala mawetetwe vaa ĩtheo ũtanamba kũtũma.
proposal.form.success: Nĩ mũvea mũno nũndũ wa kũsoma nesa.
proposal.form.successFollowUp: Ũkesa kũneena ĩngĩ na IATF ĩũlũ wa ũndũ ũsu, neena na ala mesene na mĩao vaa ĩtheo.
proposal.form.successLinkLabel: Kaati sya kwĩlilikany'a vala ũvoo mũna umĩtw'e
proposal.form.errorGeneric: Ve kaũndũ kaĩ mavĩtyo nthĩnĩ wa kũtũmĩwa kwa mesengyi. Tata kũsemba ĩngĩ. Ethĩwa thĩna ndũnambĩĩa, no ũtũmĩe simũ.
proposal.field.required: No Nginya Mũndũ Akethĩwa E wa Ndĩni
project.detail.eyebrow: Andũ ma mũvĩa wa kũseũvya syĩndũ
project.detail.problemTitle: Nĩ thĩna wĩva walikile nũndũ wa mũvango ũsu?
project.detail.field.repository: Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova
project.detail.defaultLanguageNotes: Ndeto sya Kĩsũngũ ila itũmĩĩtwe mĩsoanĩ ĩsu no ialyũlwe na kĩthyomo kya ala matew'aa
footer.label: Maelesyo ma kwongeleela
footer.licenseContent: Maũndũ ala me vo CC BY-SA 4.0
footer.blurb: Kwoou nũseo vethĩwe na ngwatanĩo nzeo na mawĩa asu maiũngamĩwa nesa.
footer.source: Kĩsese kya Indaneti kya Ngũsĩ sya Yeova: www.jw.org [W3C WAI](https://www.w3.org/WAI/)Kũtetheesya ala me na mathĩna ma mwĩĩ
contact.label: Ũneenany'a
project.status.stable: Kwĩthĩwa na Woni Waĩle Ĩũlũ wa Makũlyo
project.status.seeking-maintainer: Nĩenda mũndũ wa kũũngamĩa wĩa wakwa
project.status.archived: Maũndũ ala me Vukunĩ ya Ũvoo Mũseo
translation.label: Kũalyũlwa kwa Mbivilia Ĩla Ĩalyũlĩtwe Nesa
translation.source: Kĩthyomo kĩla kĩtũmĩawa mũno kĩthyomonĩ kĩĩ nĩ Kĩsũngũ.
translation.humanReviewed: Ũalyũlo ũsu wĩkĩtwe moalyũku nĩ mũndũ wĩsĩ kũneena nesa.
translation.machineAssisted: Mbivilia ĩno ĩalyũlĩtwe na masinĩ na ndĩsa kũsiw'a nĩ mũndũ wĩ na ũtũĩka wa kũalyũla.
translation.needsUpdate: Mbivilia ĩsu yaalyũlilwe tene yaĩ ĩtonya kũkwatĩkana kwa ithyomo ingĩ, na kwoou yaĩ no nginya ĩalyũlwe ĩngĩ.
translation.report: Tuma ũvoo ĩũlũ wa thĩna wa kũalyũla: {{contact.i18nEmail}}Kwa w'o .
